name: gogreen-mcp-app
description: Go Green EV Ride Agent — MCP App with rich interactive UI

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.server.json && cross-env INPUT=src/views/main.html vite build
scripts.start: concurrently "cross-env NODE_ENV=development INPUT=src/views/main.html vite build --watch" "tsx watch src/main.ts"
